description: Retheme PixelSpriteView as cute ghost characters with improved name text visibility, and retheme PixelFurnitureView as haunted mansion furniture.
steps: Step 1 - Rethemed PixelSpriteView.swift as ghost characters with 6 visual states and improved name text.
Step 2 - Rethemed PixelFurnitureView.swift with gothic desk, throne, potion cauldron, dark stone counter, jack-o-lantern.
acceptance_criteria: swift test passes 258 tests with 0 failures
findings: 258 tests, 0 failures. Ghost sprites and haunted furniture complete.
